# Turn ledger: ZombieOrchard run reset generation

**Timestamp:** `2026-07-12T14-38-35-04-00`  
**Repository:** `LuminaryLabs-Publish/ZombieOrchard`  
**Branch:** `main`

## Summary

Selected ZombieOrchard under the oldest eligible synchronized-repository rule. Audited the absence of a true New Game/restart transaction: route changes reuse the same mutable run, and a failed run remains ended so later Play/Start returns immediately to Outcome.

## Plan ledger

**Goal:** record the source-backed run-reset finding, required DSK boundary, generated files and validation non-claims.

- [x] Reconfirmed 27 implemented kit surfaces and their services.

- [ ] Runtime implementation and restart fixtures remain pending.

## Main source finding

`createOrchardGame()` creates every mutable domain once. Preset actions named Play, New Game, Start and Title only change the active interface route. No domain implements reset, no runtime command replaces the run graph, and no run generation exists.

After failure, `active-session.ended` remains true. Outcome Title returns to Entry, but the next Play/Start re-enters the same ended session; `interface-composition.tick()` then routes back to Outcome.

## Validation

Documentation only. Runtime, dependencies, package scripts, gameplay, rendering and deployment were unchanged. Existing smoke proof does not test New Game, Title/reset, failed-run restart, cross-domain clean state, duplicate reset, rollback or visible reset-generation parity.
